title: Make fails when NDEBUG=1
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue
make clean
make config-clang
# set NDEBUG=1 in Makefile with your preferred editor
make

## Expected behavior

Build success

## Actual behavior

Build fails with:

```
passes/techmap/abc9_ops.cc:778:21: error: use of undeclared identifier 'box_module'
                        auto abc9_flop = box_module->attributes.count("\\abc9_flop");
                                         ^
passes/techmap/abc9_ops.cc:789:46: error: use of undeclared identifier 'derived_type'
                        for (const auto &port_name : box_ports.at(derived_type)) {
                                                                  ^
passes/techmap/abc9_ops.cc:790:22: error: use of undeclared identifier 'box_module'
                                RTLIL::Wire *w = box_module->wire(port_name);
```
